title: BreadMod
description: A lot of new blocks to build with, EPIC! :D
body:
A cute little mod that adds a few new decorative blocks including:

 

- Table (Oak, Birch, Jungle, Spruce, Dark Oak & Acacia)
- Bamboo Table
- Drawer (Functional)
- Frame
- Frame Block
 

More blocks are to come soon! :)
